case_title: WEBSTER, PATRICIA B. VS KARKAR, RHONDA IND & DBA THE LITTLEST MOUSE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBSTER, PATRICIA B. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KARKAR, RHONDA IND & DBA THE LITTLEST MOUSE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KARKAR, RHONDA IND & DBA THE LITTLEST MOUSE
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR ORDERED CONTINUANCE ON 1/16/01 AT 1:30PM, PAID $10 CHECK.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,309.00 FILED BY WEBSTER, PATRICIA B. AS TO DEFENDANT KARKAR, RHONDA IND & DBA THE LITTLEST MOUSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-15-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-16-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER SIGNED BY COMMISIONER.
